[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100011 3
1 1100101 4
2 1111001 5
3 0011011 4
4 1111011 6
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 1101000 3

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0010001 2
23 32 0100001 2
34 43 0100001 2
45 54 1100001 3
56 65 0011001 3
67 76 0011011 4 match 3
70 07 1101000 3 match 7

02 20 0100000 1
13 31 0000001 1
24 42 0100001 2
35 53 0100001 2
46 64 0000001 1
57 75 1111001 5 match 2
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0011001 3

03 30 0100000 1
14 41 0000101 2
25 52 0110001 3
36 63 0000011 2
47 74 1100001 3
50 05 1101000 3 match 7
61 16 0011001 3
72 27 0110001 3

04 40 1100000 2
15 51 0011001 3
26 62 0010001 2
37 73 0100011 3 match 0
